chainID.description: Chain ID for this network (101 for mainnet-beta, 103 for devnet, 102 for testnet)

geckoId.description: GeckoTerminal network ID for this network (e.g., 'solana' for mainnet-beta)

swapProvider.description: Default swap router provider for this network (format: connector/type, e.g., jupiter/router)

minPriorityFeePerCU.description: Minimum priority fee per compute unit in lamports (floor for fee estimation)

maxPriorityFeePerCU.description: Maximum priority fee per compute unit in lamports (ceiling for fee estimation)

priorityFeeLevel.description: Helius priority fee level for fee estimation (default: High)
